title: Justice for Rape Survivors Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
crs_summary: Justice for Rape Survivors Act This bill establishes a 30-year statutory mandatory minimum prison term for the following federal sexual abuse offenses:  causing another person to engage in a sexual act by using force against that person or by threatening or placing that person in fear, engaging in or attempting to engage in a sexual act with another person by rendering the other person unconscious or intoxicated, causing or attempting to cause another person to engage in a sexual act by threatening or placing that person in fear, engaging or attempting to engage in a sexual act if the other person is incapacitated, and engaging or attempting to engage in a sexual act without the other person's consent.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
